title: Blue Canyon Nonslip Antibacterial Rubber Bath Mats, Quick Dry Bath Rug with Suction Pads & Drain Holes, Mould Resistant Bathroom Accessory, Durable Bath Rug Runner 34 x 74 cm – White
features: 【 DURABLE RUBBER MATERIAL 】: You will definitely appreciate the luxury of standing on the Blue Canyon flexible & comfy bath mat made from Rubber, as it supports your ankles and feet to stand with utmost relief for a more extended period. The Rubber material of this rug is enjoyable on the skin, helps ease the stress on joints, and maintains a good posture.

【 EASY WATER DRAINAGE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber bath runner rug comes with hundreds of drainage holes that allow water to easily flow under the mat and towards the drain, helping to prevent water from sitting stagnant under the mat in your tub & hence prevent mould formation.

【 ANTI-SLIP BACKING 】: Don’t worry about being fractured from dangerous slips and slides while getting out of your bathroom. Our high-performance Bath rug mat stays where you place it, as they come with the backing of suction pads, making it slip-resistant & eliminating the need for constant readjustments, and keeping your loved ones from falling.

【 MULTIPURPOSE USE 】: Our Blue Canyon Rubber luxury floor mats are great for hallways, entryways, family/living rooms, bedrooms, home offices, kitchens, dining rooms, drawing rooms, and anywhere from low traffic to elevated areas of your home. Each Pedestaling makes any room in your home livelier and more comfortable, adding a subtle yet profound accent to any room in your house.

【 FANCIFUL STYLING 】: Make your home decor fun with our vibrant Rubber Bath Mat runners! These Pedestal mat rugs are suitable for most interior designs. Our fanciful styling door mats are available in classic patterns. You can layer them or mix and match them according to your room themes as they are designed keeping in mind the trending interior designing accessories.
description: Product Description A FULLY MANAGED SUPPLY CHAIN OF HOUSEHOLD RANGES Our home and bathroom accessory ranges are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends in; bathroom textiles, bathroom accessories, laundry and storage – providing a full homeware range to our clients. An introduction to Blue Canyon... Luxury By Design Blue Canyon are at the forefront of Bathroom Accessory and Homeware manufacturing and distribution. Having built an enviable supply chain of proven providers during the course of 30 years’ experience in the bathroom accessory industries, Blue Canyon have a global reach in manufacturing that ensures the smoothest of operations and supply. Bathroom Mats Fabric Mats Blue Canyon have an extensive range of bathroom mats in varying colours to suit your bathroom whatever the style. Colours include (but are not limited too) blue, grey, pink, orange, yellow and cream. All bath mats are cotton or polyester and are available as a single mat or as a set for the bath and the basin. Plastic Mats Blue Canyons plastic mats are the perfect solution for slippery surfaces. In various colours and styles the plastic or rubber matting are ideal for a shower or bathroom, also available with suction pads to avoid slipping. Cork Mats Cork is the most natural bath mat option, available in different thicknesses and shapes. The perfect bathroom mat option. Visit Our Brand Store To view the full range of blue canyon products please scroll to the top of the page and click on the visit brand store; you can be sure to find quality stylish items at affordable prices.
